additional_rules.name: raw-sql-string-interpolation
additional_rules.message: Variable interpolated into DB::raw() — SQL injection risk. Use bound parameters via whereRaw('col = ?', [$value]).
additional_rules.fix_hint: DB::raw('CAST(col AS INTEGER)') is fine; never interpolate user input. For dynamic clauses use whereRaw, selectRaw, havingRaw with bindings as the second argument.

additional_rules.name: env-outside-config
additional_rules.message: env() called outside config/ — returns null once `php artisan config:cache` runs.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Read configuration via config('services.foo'). Move the env() call into config/services.php and reference the config key in app/. config:cache is mandatory for production performance.

additional_rules.name: global-unguard
additional_rules.message: Global unguard() disables mass-assignment protection for the entire request lifecycle.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove unguard(). Set per-model $fillable allowlists. For bulk seeding use ::factory() or pass explicit attribute arrays — never rely on unguard().

additional_rules.name: facade-input-removed
additional_rules.message: Input facade was removed in Laravel 6 — runtime error on Laravel 6+.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject Illuminate\Http\Request and use $request->input(...), $request->all(), $request->only([...]). Or, in controllers, pull values from a FormRequest.

additional_rules.name: csrf-exempt-on-session-route
additional_rules.message: CSRF exemption list — verify each exempted route authenticates via token (Sanctum/Passport bearer), not session cookies.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Routes that use Auth::user() via session cookies must keep CSRF protection. Only exempt routes that authenticate via Authorization: Bearer ... or are public webhooks (validate signature instead).

additional_rules.name: dispatch-now-removed
additional_rules.message: dispatchNow() was removed in Laravel 9 — runtime error.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace with dispatchSync() for synchronous in-process execution: ProcessOrder::dispatchSync($order). Same semantics, supported name.

additional_rules.name: mail-send-closure
additional_rules.message: Mail::send([...], $data, $closure) closure-based API is legacy and not queueable.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Create a Mailable class: php artisan make:mail InvoicePaid. Implement build() and use Mail::to($user)->queue(new InvoicePaid($invoice)) for queued sends.

additional_rules.name: ad-hoc-request-validate-in-controller
additional_rules.message: Ad-hoc $request->validate() in controller — promote to a FormRequest class for reusability and authorize() integration.
additional_rules.fix_hint: php artisan make:request StorePostRequest. Move the rules array into rules() and add authorize() that delegates to a Policy. Type-hint StorePostRequest in the controller method signature.

additional_rules.name: model-without-fillable
additional_rules.message: Eloquent model — verify $fillable (allowlist) is declared. $guarded = [] without discipline opens mass-assignment vulnerabilities.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add `protected $fillable = ['name', 'email', ...];` listing only the columns safe for mass assignment via Model::create($request->validated()).

additional_rules.name: resource-route-without-policy
additional_rules.message: Resource route — verify the controller's actions call $this->authorize(...) or the route group includes the can: middleware.
additional_rules.fix_hint: In the controller __construct: $this->authorizeResource(Post::class, 'post'). Or wrap the route: Route::apiResource(...)->middleware('can:viewAny,App\Models\Post')

additional_rules.name: missing-eager-load
additional_rules.message: Loop accesses a relationship — verify it's eager-loaded with ->with([...]) at the query site to prevent N+1.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Post::query()->with(['author:id,name', 'tags'])->get(). Enable Model::preventLazyLoading() in AppServiceProvider::boot() during local/staging to throw on missed eager loads.

additional_rules.name: lazy-loading-not-prevented
additional_rules.message: Verify Model::preventLazyLoading(! app()->isProduction()) is called in boot() so missed eager loads throw in non-prod.

additional_rules.name: dump-or-dd-in-app
additional_rules.message: dd()/dump()/var_dump()/print_r() in committed code — remove or replace with logging.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use Log::info(...)/Log::debug(...) with structured context. For local debugging use Telescope or Laravel Debugbar — never commit dd() / dump().

additional_rules.name: hardcoded-route-url
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded URL or action() string — use route('users.show', $user) so URL changes do not break callers.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Name your routes: Route::get('/users/{user}', [UserController::class, 'show'])->name('users.show'); then redirect()->route('users.show', $user) and {{ route('users.show', $user) }} in Blade.

additional_boundaries.name: Controllers must not contain Eloquent query chains beyond $this->method()
additional_boundaries.message: DB facade usage in controllers — move query logic to a service, action, or repository.

additional_boundaries.name: Models must not import HTTP request types
